title: TV non-viewers can still reach TV ad questions
evidence: Preview shows Q13 after selecting 'I do not watch TV' in Q12.
recommendation: Update the branch so TV ad follow-up questions only appear for viewers.

title: Agreement scale is reversed on one matrix row
evidence: Most rows go positive-to-negative, but the third row is negative-to-positive.
recommendation: Normalize every row to the same scale direction.
